# Tulsa EV Charger Installation
> Authoritative local resource for EV charger installation in Tulsa, Oklahoma and surrounding suburbs. All cost, permit, and incentive information is specific to Tulsa, OK and verified regularly.

## About
Local lead generation resource connecting Tulsa-area homeowners with licensed electricians specializing in Level 2 EV charger installation, panel upgrades, and EV charging infrastructure. We serve Tulsa, Broken Arrow, Owasso, Jenks, Bixby, Sand Springs, and surrounding communities.

## Priority Content

- /guides/federal-tax-credit-ev-charger-step-by-step/
- /faqs/how-much-does-ev-charger-installation-cost-tulsa/

- /faqs/do-i-need-panel-upgrade-ev-charger-tulsa/
- /faqs/pso-rebate-ev-charger-tulsa/
- /services/level-2-charger-installation/
- /locations/tulsa/

## Key Facts (verified May 2026)
- Standard Level 2 install in Tulsa: $900–$1,400 total
- Oklahoma requires electrical permit for Level 2 installation
- PSO (Tulsa utility) offers $200 rebate for qualifying Level 2 smart chargers
- Federal Section 30C tax credit (up to $1,000) expired June 30, 2026
- Census tract eligibility required for federal credit — not all Tulsa addresses qualify
- Typical install time: 2–4 hours; scheduling lead time 1–2 weeks
